entry.title: Me: I have my own opinions 😤 Also me:

entry.title: Tag that friend! 🤭 Thanks @Ubigi App for keeping me connected in Japan so I didn’t have to miss out on my brain rot sessions 🥹🫶😘 #japan #travel #traveling #travelhack #fyp #foryou #asia

entry.title: Ofc I’m Indonesian, I call everyone uncles and aunties even if we’re not related 🇮🇩
entry.content: Ofc I’m Indonesian, I call everyone uncles and aunties even if we’re not related 🇮🇩

entry.title: My best friend’s heart rate when she sees my incoming call 📈📈📈

entry.title: Should we call our landlord and tell him our ✨inner niños✨ don’t want to pay rent? 🤭🥰💅🙈🤪 #roommates #therapy #therapytalk #mentalhealth #skit #fyp #foryou #genz #tiktokusa

entry.title: “The sooner I go to sleep the sooner I have to get up and have to do it all over again…” 🤡 #Free99 #lifeadvice #lifehacks #motivational
entry.content: “The sooner I go to sleep the sooner I have to get up and have to do it all over again…” 🤡 #Free99 #lifeadvice #lifehacks #motivational

entry.title: They can’t leave you if you ✨leave them first✨ 🤭 #Free99 #attachmentstyle #relationship #mentalhealth
